errors.unauthenticated: You must be signed in to manage notifications.

ui.empty_description: When someone reacts, comments, quotes or mentions your posts, you'll see it here.

overview.title: Notifications — Overview
overview.description: End-user notifications generated by social events. Zero-latency fanout via DB trigger on posts_outbox.

settings.title: Notifications — Settings
settings.dedup_window_minutes_help: A notification with the same recipient, type, post, actor within this window is skipped.
settings.list_page_size_help: How many notifications to load per batch in the /notifiche list.
settings.retention_days_help: Notifications older than N days will be deleted by the cleanup cron (future).
